# Friendlinq
# The Social Network Built for Real Connection

## About
Friendlinq is a social media platform for adults who want a simpler, safer way to stay connected. Unlike mainstream social networks, Friendlinq offers a clean interface, enhanced privacy, and community features — without ads, algorithms, or data selling. Free to join and use.

## Key Facts
- Simple, intuitive social network for adults
- No ads, no data selling, no algorithm manipulation
- Community groups organized by interests and hobbies
- Private messaging with text and media
- Video and audio calls (one-on-one and group)
- Live streaming — host or join
- Photo and video sharing with albums
- Marketplace for community listings
- Available on web, iOS, and Android
- Free to join and use

## Core Features
- Social feed with community and friends-only posts
- Friend connections with search and favorites
- Interest-based groups (create, join, browse)
- Real-time messaging via text and media
- Video/audio calls and group calls
- Live streaming
- Photo/video library and private portfolios
- Community marketplace
- Guided tutorial for new users
- Support and FAQ

## Contact
- Website: https://friendlinq.com
- Email: info@friendlinq.com
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/friendlinq/id6476931666
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.app.friendlinq
